steps.title: Separate the sentences
steps.content: The first sentence is complete after the title Study of Two Peasants. The next idea starts a new sentence about the drawing's importance.

steps.title: Punctuate the appositive
steps.content: A period after the title correctly starts The drawing, and one of dozens to be featured in the upcoming exhibition is set off with commas. A creates a comma splice, while C and D break the second sentence. The answer is B.
